name: Guajolote En Mole Poblano (Turkey in Mole Sau
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the turkey in a pot with onions and garlic. Simmer until the meat easily pulls away from the bones.
2. Fry the corn tortilla and French roll in oil until crisp.
3. In a mortar or blender, grind together the toasted bread crumbs, herbs, spices, almonds, and chocolate until well combined.
4. Remove the turkey, onion, and garlic from the pot. Discard the onion and garlic. Keep 2-3 cups of broth.
5. Reduce the remaining broth to a simmer. Slowly stir in the ground mixture. Return the turkey to the sauce and simmer for another 20 minutes.
